graphify.register: none; skill is exposed by graphify@personal-local

gstack_bins.note: gstack@personal-local skills call bins under ~/.gstack/core. Those bins are OS-specific and NOT in git.
gstack_bins.build: git clone --depth 1 https://github.com/garrytan/gstack ~/.gstack/core && (cd ~/.gstack/core && bun install && bun run build)
